---
title: "Software Setup"
toc: true
toc-location: right
---

**What you need to do:**

- Install six core tools: Stata, R, Python, Positron, Quarto, Git
- Install the `uv` Python package manager

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Software Installation

**World Bank Laptops**

1.  Restart your computer to ensure it is fully up to date.
2.
3.  Open the **Software Center** and install all items in the table
    below in this exact order.

4.  If any program from @tbl-software does not appear in the Software
    Center, submit a [Software Installation Request](https://worldbankgroup.service-now.com/wbg/en/software-installation-request?id=wbg_sc_catalog&sys_id=bd1e71b86f16d340db112d232e3ee4b7&table=sc_cat_item&searchTerm=Software%20installation)
    or contact [ITHelp\@worldbankgroup.org](mailto:ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org).

    ![](../../assets/img/software-center.png)


| Software | WB Laptop (Software Center) | Private Laptop |
|:-----------------:|:--------------------------------:|-------------------|
| Stata (19+ MP) | ![](../../assets/img/sc-stata.png){width="50"} |  |
| Positron (latest) | ![](../../assets/img/sc-positron.png){width="50"} | [positron.posit.co](https://positron.posit.co/download.html) |
| Quarto (1.9+) | ![](../../assets/img/sc-quarto.png){width="50"} | [quarto.org](https://quarto.org/docs/get-started/) |
| R (4.5.3+) | ![](../../assets/img/sc-r.png){width="50"} | [cran.r-project.org](https://cran.r-project.org/) |
| Python (3.13+) | ![](../../assets/img/sc-python.png){width="50"} | [python.org](https://www.python.org/downloads/) |
| `uv` Python package manager | See below. |  See below. |
| Git (2.52+) | ![](../../assets/img/sc-git.png){width="50"} | [git-scm.com](https://git-scm.com/download/win) |

: Software {#tbl-software}


**`uv`: Python environment management**

1.  Press `Windows` button and type: `Power Shell`
2.  Type commands below and hit enter

``` ps
pip install uv
uv --version
```

::: {.callout-info collapse="true"}
### GIF guide for `uv` installation

![](../../assets/img/uv-working.gif){width="650"}
:::

::::::: columns
:::: {.column width="50%"}
::: callout-note
**If any software was previously installed from the Software Center:**

Press "**Install**" and each eligible package will update to the latest
version.
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="50%"}
::: callout-warning
**If any software was previously installed manually (by using an admin
password):**

Contact [ITHelp\@worldbankgroup.org](mailto:ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org)
to remove it first.
:::
::::
:::::::


## Verification

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Positron

Open **Positron**: If it launches, it is working! See [Positron
Overview](https://positron.posit.co/layout.html#basic-overview) for help
about the layout:

![Positron layout](../../assets/img/ui-positron.jpeg){width="650"}

## R

In Positron:

- Open "Console" (`Ctrl + Shift + P` and type "Console: Focus on
  Console") or navigate to "**Panel \> CONSOLE**". You should see R
  there.

![](../../assets/img/R-working.gif){width="650"}

## Python

In Positron:

1. Open **Terminal** inside Positron: (or `` Ctrl + Shift + ` `` or
    `Ctrl + Shift + P` and type: "**Terminal: Focus Terminal**").
2. Type text below and hit "Enter". It should work smoothly.

``` ps
python --version
pip list
```

![](../../assets/img/python-working.gif){width="650"}

## Quarto

**Quarto**

1.  Open **Terminal** inside Positron: (or `` Ctrl + Shift + ` `` or
    `Ctrl + Shift + P` and type: "**Terminal: Focus Terminal**").
2.  Type text below and hit "Enter". It should work smoothly.

``` ps
quarto --version
quarto check
```

![](../../assets/img/quarto-working.gif){width="650"}

## `uv`

1.  Open **Terminal** inside Positron: (or `` Ctrl + Shift + ` `` or
    `Ctrl + Shift + P` and type: "**Terminal: Focus Terminal**").
2.  Type text below and hit "Enter". It should work smoothly.

``` ps
uv --version
```

![](../../assets/img/uv-working.gif){width="650"}

:::
